openai/symphony ·GitHub ⭐ 12085 Elixir · AI Agent, Coding Tools, OpenAI, Orchestration

What it is

An experimental multi-agent orchestration framework automating totally the software implementation lifecycle converting linear issues seamlessly into fully executed verifiable pull requests robustly.

Problems solved

Shifts profoundly the developer paradigm from actively micromanaging individual coding agent subtasks towards operating strictly at the macro product-management layer verifying explicitly automated CI proofs definitively.

How to get started

Employ exactly the provided specification blueprints replicating exactly standard Symphony mechanics utilizing Elixir reference implementations natively linking explicitly internal agentic pipelines naturally.

Detailed report

1. Positioning

Symphony operates profoundly as an enterprise-grade conceptual specification bridging explicitly the transition from manual "Coding Copilot" reliance into absolute autonomous software production execution seamlessly.

2. Pain Points & Advantages

Standard AI coding tools require intense continuous human supervision checking syntax continuously. Symphony negates this completely offloading implementation entirely validating generated code natively against CI test environments presenting explicitly validated PRs significantly reducing human cognitive load absolutely.

3. Technical Architecture

Architected fundamentally as an abstract specification standard capable of running natively atop various runtime environments explicitly leveraging explicit Hook integrations manipulating explicitly asynchronous worker nodes dynamically orchestrating precisely repository states.

4. Core Implementation

Routes linear ticket requirements spawning parallel agent instances mapping explicitly repository modifications validating continuous integration matrices analyzing mathematically structural complexities rendering explicitly walkthrough summaries proposing perfectly formatted Pull Requests securely.

5. Code Organization

Structured deeply as a SPEC.md standard providing explicitly functional Elixir demonstration directories tracking precisely process execution nodes natively testing definitively explicit agent communication logic explicitly.

6. Quick Start Suggestion

Evaluate deeply the theoretical /SPEC.md constraints prompting explicitly an advanced LLM translating precisely the conceptual orchestration nodes rewriting specifically the exact logic into your preferred native tech stack accurately.

7. Summary

A tremendously visionary architectural paradigm redefining radically future software engineering logic optimizing deeply how human resources fundamentally delegate highly complex programmatic tasks confidently.
